description:
Returns a collection of Observation Items.
See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_company_id]
parameters.description: Array of Vendor IDs. Returns item(s) where the assignee is associated to the specified Vendor ID.

parameters.name: filters[checklist_list_id]
parameters.description: Array of Checklist List IDs. Return item(s) associated with the specified Checklist List IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) created by the specified User IDs.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Location IDs.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) assigned to the specified User ID.

parameters.name: filters[checklist_item_id]
parameters.description: Return Observations(s) originating from the specified Checklist Item(s).

parameters.name: filters[priority]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified priorities.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Return item(s) matching the specified Search query.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) with the specified status values. The mapping is as follows:
```
  0: Initiated
  1: Ready For reviewed
  2: Not Accepted
  3: Closed
```

parameters.name: filters[type_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Observation Type ID.

parameters.name: filters[trade_ids]
parameters.description: Array of Trade IDs. Returns item(s) with the specified Trade IDs.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

date_notified.description: Date that the Observation Item Assignee was notified

due_date.description: Date that the Observation Item is due by

origin.description: Origin Item that the Observation was created from

payload.description: Payload Keys change depending on origin.

vendor.description: Company of User assigned to the Observation Item

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location
Timestamp of last update to Trade

active.description: Flag denoting if the Observation Type is available for use

company_active.description: Flag denoting if the Company is available for use

parent_inactive.description: Flag denoting if the Parent is available for use

in_use.description: Flag denoting if the in use is available for use

name_translations.description: Company's custom translations for observation type

localized_name.description: returns the localized observation_type name. It'll return custom traslations depending on the param sent in.

permissions.description: User permissions for this observation item

can_edit.description: Whether the user can edit this observation item
